claim: Synthetic flagship claim: frozen protocol cybersecurity capability improved adjacent mandate performance under control-vs-treatment assay.

parent_business.title: Protocol Cybersecurity Studio
parent_business.problem_purchased: Buyers purchase release-gate confidence on value-moving protocol paths before shipping governance and settlement changes.
parent_business.review_posture: evidence-first adversarial review with replayable repro artifacts
parent_business.pricing_mode_illustrative: fixed mandate fee + severity-weighted bonus for accepted replayable findings
parent_business.release_gate_positioning: block release until mandate packet meets declared evidence and safety thresholds
parent_business.why_archive_compounds: Each accepted packet hardens ontology, query bundles, and evidence templates, reducing future time-to-first-accepted output while maintaining safety.
parent_business.sovereign_candidate_path: When adjacent mandates repeatedly pass strict thresholds with explicit package dependence and no safety regression, the archive graduates toward Protocol Cybersecurity Sovereign candidacy.
parent_business.synthetic_disclaimer: This artifact is synthetic and illustrative for local replay.
parent_business.doctrine_boundary: This positions protocol cybersecurity as the first narrow high-verification organ and seed for broader future capability; it does not claim full cybersecurity sovereignty already exists.

doctrine_stack.title: Full-Stack Economic Organism Doctrine Stack
doctrine_stack.positioning: Protocol correctness is the first compounding correctness wedge under high-verification conditions.
doctrine_stack.nation_state_doctrine: The Full-Stack Economic Organism is governed as a driven nonequilibrium system: capital, compute, and telemetry are converted into proof-bound reusable security capability faster than entropy pressure from uncertainty, adversaries, and coordination loss.
not_claimed: A full cybersecurity sovereign already exists.
Cybersecurity is solved once and for all.
The thermodynamic framing is literal physical law.
organism_loop: AGI Jobs converts candidate work into validated output through identity, proof, settlement, and governance.
Archive freezes successful fluctuations into reusable structure.

equation_catalog.free_energy_diff: d\mathcal G = d\mathcal H - T_{\text{eff}}\,d\mathcal S_{\text{org}} - \mathcal S_{\text{org}}\,dT_{\text{eff}}
equation_catalog.microstate_energy: E_i = E_i^{\text{resource}} + E_i^{\text{error}} + E_i^{\text{latency}} + E_i^{\text{governance}} - E_i^{\text{reuse}}

thermodynamic_model_summary.formal_status: governance analogy with measurable operational content; not literal physical law
thermodynamic_model_summary.boundary_statement: Use thermodynamic/statistical-physics language as disciplined governance notation, not as a claim of settled empirical physical law for institutions.

equation_catalog.free_energy_diff: d\mathcal G = d\mathcal H - T_{\text{eff}}\,d\mathcal S_{\text{org}} - \mathcal S_{\text{org}}\,dT_{\text{eff}}
equation_catalog.microstate_energy: E_i = E_i^{\text{resource}} + E_i^{\text{error}} + E_i^{\text{latency}} + E_i^{\text{governance}} - E_i^{\text{reuse}}

nova_seed_lineup.title: Audit Factory Seed
nova_seed_lineup.mutation_thesis: Maximize breadth-first issue harvesting with strict triage templates.
nova_seed_lineup.operator_workflow_delta: Front-load contract surface enumeration and standardized triage queues.
likely_weaknesses: can miss deep state-path edge cases
nova_seed_lineup.admissible_risk: medium false-positive risk if triage heuristics are over-broad
nova_seed_lineup.evidence_strategy: structured finding templates with reproducible pointers
nova_seed_lineup.likely_archive_contribution: structured triage queues, severity calibration tables, reviewer packet templates

nova_seed_lineup.title: Exploit Replay Seed
nova_seed_lineup.mutation_thesis: Map known exploit families onto current contracts to rapidly test inherited failure modes.
nova_seed_lineup.operator_workflow_delta: Run exploit-pattern replay passes before bespoke analysis.
likely_weaknesses: less adaptable to novel governance semantics
nova_seed_lineup.evidence_strategy: historical exploit class mapping with local replay traces
nova_seed_lineup.likely_archive_contribution: exploit-class replay scripts, adversarial scenario catalog, inherited failure checklists

nova_seed_lineup.title: Fuzz Harness Seed
nova_seed_lineup.mutation_thesis: Use seeded property fuzzing to find edge-case transition failures quickly.
nova_seed_lineup.operator_workflow_delta: Generate deterministic fuzz harnesses before manual deep-dive.
likely_weaknesses: weaker narrative evidence if not curated
nova_seed_lineup.evidence_strategy: failing seed traces plus minimized repro
nova_seed_lineup.likely_archive_contribution: deterministic failing seeds, minimization recipes, regression harness templates

nova_seed_lineup.title: Governance Parameter Simulator Seed
nova_seed_lineup.mutation_thesis: Stress governance outcomes under parameter shifts (quorum, challenge windows, role thresholds).
nova_seed_lineup.operator_workflow_delta: Run deterministic parameter sweep before line-level issue extraction.
likely_weaknesses: can underperform on low-level contract anti-patterns
nova_seed_lineup.likely_archive_contribution: parameter-sweep matrices, governance sensitivity traces, policy stress-test notebooks

nova_seed_lineup.title: Invariant Library Seed
nova_seed_lineup.mutation_thesis: Start from reusable governance and settlement invariants, then map code paths against them.
nova_seed_lineup.operator_workflow_delta: Require each finding to link to broken invariant and state-transition path.
nova_seed_lineup.likely_archive_contribution: canonical invariant ontology, state-transition trace grammar, reusable verification clauses

mandate_1_summary.selection_basis: deterministic lexicographic rank across usefulness, speed, rework, evidence, safety, package quality

accepted_findings.broken_invariant_or_state_path: Value movement must be gated by validated authority and challenge semantics.
accepted_findings.severity_rationale: Funds or control can move before proper validation guardrails.
accepted_findings.suggested_fix: Add release-gate precondition checks and explicit challenge/proof barriers.
